title: Colored swords
description: A texture pack that changes the way the swords looks, Making them shorter and colored.
body:
This Resource Pack makes the sword look colored and shorter for a less unobstructive viewing experience.

# EXAMPLE

##  This is Without the colored swords Resource Pack.
![This is without the colored swords Resource pack.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4b8e4b950484eda3e9903b43351e9b84033816a1.png)

##  This is with the colored swords Resource Pack.
![This is with the colored swords Resource pack.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6afd66fa00be62f353c16a30b98809f83aec8f69.png)
